all.en: This guide describes the standard cross docking workflow at the central hub.
all.zh: 本指南說明中央集散中心的標準越庫作業流程。

all.en: Cross docking moves goods directly from inbound trucks to outbound vehicles.
all.zh: 越庫作業將貨物自進貨車輛直接轉至出貨車輛。

all.en: The model minimizes storage time and reduces overall handling costs significantly.
all.zh: 此模式可將存放時間降至最低，並大幅降低整體搬運成本。

all.en: Inbound trucks must be scheduled through the dock appointment system in advance.
all.zh: 進貨車輛需透過月台預約系統提前排程。

all.en: Drivers report to the security gate and present a confirmed reference number.
all.zh: 司機需至警衛室報到並出示確認的預約編號。

all.en: Dock assignments are displayed on the digital screen at the staging area.
all.zh: 月台分派資訊將顯示於暫存區的電子看板。

all.en: Receiving clerks verify shipment documents against the advance shipping notice.
all.zh: 收貨人員依據出貨預先通知核對貨運文件。

all.en: Pallets are scanned upon arrival to record condition and item counts accurately.
all.zh: 棧板於到貨時即進行掃描，準確紀錄狀態與數量。

all.en: Damaged or short shipments must be reported to the supervisor immediately.
all.zh: 如有損壞或短少貨物，應立即通報主管。

all.en: Sorting takes place in the central staging lanes using color coded markings.
all.zh: 分揀作業於中央暫存通道進行，採彩色標示分區。

all.en: Each destination route corresponds to a unique lane and barcode label format.
all.zh: 每一目的地路線對應專屬通道與條碼標籤格式。

all.en: Outbound staging must be completed within two hours of inbound arrival.
all.zh: 出貨備位須於進貨抵達後兩小時內完成。

all.en: Material handlers transport goods using powered pallet jacks across the dock floor.
all.zh: 搬運人員以電動托盤車於月台地板移動貨物。

all.en: Pedestrian walkways are clearly marked to ensure safety during peak hours.
all.zh: 行人通道有清楚標示，以確保尖峰時段安全。

all.en: Loaders verify each pallet against the outbound manifest before sealing the trailer.
all.zh: 裝載人員封櫃前需依出貨清單核對每張棧板。

all.en: Trailer seals are recorded in the warehouse management system upon departure.
all.zh: 拖車封條於出貨時於倉儲管理系統中登錄。

all.en: Real time dashboards monitor throughput and dwell time at every dock door.
all.zh: 即時儀表板監控每個月台門的吞吐量與停留時間。

all.en: Daily targets include average dwell times below ninety minutes per shipment.
all.zh: 每日目標包含每筆貨物平均停留時間低於九十分鐘。

all.en: Exceptions are logged into the incident tracker for end of shift review meetings.
all.zh: 例外事件登錄至事件追蹤系統，供下班檢討會議使用。

all.en: Continuous improvement teams analyze trends to refine procedures every month.
all.zh: 持續改善小組每月分析趨勢，以精進作業程序。

all.en: Safety briefings occur at the start of every shift in the operations briefing room.
all.zh: 每班開始前於營運簡報室進行安全宣導。

all.en: Personal protective equipment is mandatory in all dock and staging zones.
all.zh: 所有月台與暫存區皆須穿戴個人防護裝備。

all.en: By following this workflow, our hub maintains industry leading service levels.
all.zh: 遵循本流程，本集散中心得以維持業界領先的服務水準。

all.en: New employees attend a two week orientation covering dock procedures and safety codes.
all.zh: 新進員工須參加為期兩週的訓練，內容涵蓋月台作業與安全規範。

all.en: Forklift operators must renew certification every three years through the training department.
all.zh: 堆高機操作員須每三年透過訓練部門更新證照。

all.en: Seasonal volume surges require additional temporary staff hired through approved agencies.
all.zh: 季節性貨量高峰時需透過合格人力派遣公司增聘臨時人員。

all.en: Weekly performance reports are distributed to operations managers every Monday morning.
all.zh: 每週績效報告於星期一上午分送各營運主管。

all.en: Customer service teams receive shipment status updates through the integrated tracking portal.
all.zh: 客服團隊透過整合追蹤平台接收貨物狀態更新。

all.en: Carriers must comply with the facility's appointment policy to avoid detention fees.
all.zh: 承運商須遵守本場站預約政策，以免產生滯留費用。

all.en: Quality audits sample one percent of pallets each day to verify scanning accuracy.
all.zh: 品質稽核每日抽樣百分之一的棧板，以驗證掃描準確度。

all.en: Cold chain shipments follow separate procedures detailed in the refrigerated handling manual.
all.zh: 冷鏈貨物依冷藏搬運手冊所載的獨立程序處理。

all.en: All exceptions exceeding two hours trigger an automatic notification to senior leadership.
all.zh: 凡超過兩小時的例外狀況，將自動通報資深管理階層。

all.en: Year end reviews evaluate cost savings and identify priority projects for next year.
all.zh: 年終檢討評估節省成本並列出明年的優先專案。

all.en: Automated guided vehicles assist with repetitive transport between staging and outbound lanes.
all.zh: 自動導引車輛協助暫存與出貨通道間之重複性搬運作業。

all.en: Sustainability initiatives include reusable pallet programs with several long term partners.
all.zh: 永續倡議包含與多家長期夥伴推動之重複使用棧板計畫。

all.en: Energy efficient lighting was installed across the entire dock area last quarter.
all.zh: 節能照明已於上季完成整個月台區域之安裝。

all.en: Driver lounges provide rest facilities while shipments are processed inside the warehouse.
all.zh: 司機休息室於倉內處理貨物期間提供休憩設施。

all.en: Cross training programs allow staff to rotate between scanning, sorting, and loading roles.
all.zh: 跨職能訓練計畫使員工可於掃描、分揀與裝載職務間輪調。

all.en: Performance bonuses reward teams that achieve daily throughput and quality benchmarks.
all.zh: 績效獎金獎勵達成每日吞吐量與品質基準之團隊。

all.en: Carrier scorecards rank trucking partners based on on time arrival and damage rates.
all.zh: 承運商評分卡依準時到達與損壞率對運輸夥伴進行排名。

all.en: Holiday peak season planning begins in August with capacity reservations and staff hiring.
all.zh: 假期旺季規劃自八月開始，包含量能預訂與人員招募。

all.en: Disaster recovery drills are conducted twice a year with local emergency response teams.
all.zh: 災害復原演練每年舉行兩次，與當地緊急應變團隊共同進行。

all.en: Feedback channels welcome operational improvement suggestions from staff at every organizational level.
all.zh: 意見回饋管道歡迎各級組織員工提出營運改善建議。

all.en: Honestly, I love watching the dock screen update in real time, it kind of feels like air traffic control.
all.zh: 老實說我超愛看月台螢幕即時更新，感覺有點像航管台。

all.en: My buddy from the night shift always leaves a thermos of hot tea behind for the morning crew in winter.
all.zh: 冬天時夜班的好友總會留一壺熱茶給早班同事。

all.en: Don't park your scooter in the loading lane, even just for five minutes during a quick lunch run.
all.zh: 就算只是趕著吃午餐五分鐘，也別把機車停在裝卸通道上。

all.en: I once spotted a damaged pallet on inbound and the supervisor actually wrote me a thank you card.
all.zh: 有次我發現進貨棧板有損壞，主管後來真的寫了張感謝卡給我。

all.en: The driver lounge upgrade with massage chairs has honestly made our truckers way friendlier lately.
all.zh: 司機休息室升級裝了按摩椅後，老實說我們的卡車司機脾氣都變好了。

all.en: Be careful walking past the cold chain lane, the temperature drop can really shock you in summer.
all.zh: 經過冷鏈通道時要小心，夏天時溫差大到會讓你嚇一跳。

all.en: Honestly, the cross training rotation kept my job from getting boring after my first three years here.
all.zh: 老實說跨職能輪調讓我在這裡待滿三年後也不會覺得無聊。

all.en: My team grabbed boba together to celebrate hitting the ninety minute dwell time target for a whole week.
all.zh: 整週都達成九十分鐘停留時間目標後，我們團隊一起去喝珍奶慶祝。

all.en: Don't forget to grab a high visibility vest from the entrance bin even if you're just walking through briefly.
all.zh: 就算只是短暫經過，也別忘了在入口處箱子裡拿件高能見度背心。

all.en: If you spot a forklift driver looking tired during a long shift, just chat with them and offer a break swap.
all.zh: 如果你看到堆高機司機在長班次裡看起來很累，就跟他聊聊提議換班休息。
